app.name: Quran Mood Explorer
app.title: Quran Mood Explorer - Find Verses by Emotion & Situation
app.description: Discover Quranic verses that resonate with your current mood and life situation. Find comfort, guidance, and wisdom from the Holy Quran through our intelligent verse recommendation system. Perfect for spiritual reflection and emotional support.

home.tagline: Discover comfort in verses that speak to you

reflection.title: Share Your Reflection
reflection.prompt: Based on your situation and these verses, what comes to your mind? Write a public reflection to QR
reflection.question: Based on your situation and these verses, what comes to your mind?
reflection.select-verse: Select a verse to attach to your reflection
reflection.based-on-verses: Based on these verses, what reflections come to mind?

footer.tagline: Find verses that speak to your soul

errors.fetching-verses: Something went wrong while fetching verses
errors.no-verses-found: No verses found for your mood
errors.general-error: Something went wrong while fetching verses
